substrate.value: SiO₂ coated p-type Si (1-10 V cm, doping 1×10¹⁵ cm⁻³)

otherAspects.safety: ALD ZnO requires handling of volatile precursors like diethyl zinc; oxygen plasma treatment involves controlled exposure to O₂ plasma.
